title: Theatre Of Wholiness
description: A queer cosmic cabaret of myth, mischief and metamorphosis... Part theatre, part ritual, part glitch in the matrix - Theatre of Wholiness invites you into an intimate space where identity is shapeshifting, joy is medicine, and the ordinary loosens its grip. Lumi the Host - glitch-witch storyteller and sassy steward of the in-between - guides you on a journey through archetype, embodiment, humour and presence. Co-created with the room as a one-off collective moment. This is a space where wholeness isn’t something you chase - it’s something you activate. Playful. Tender. Disarming. A celebration of queer becoming and the art of returning to yourself.
